Buy Tickets

Dare to Discover Austin's Dark Side

JAustin's Only Ghost Tour on Wheels — Because the Dead Don't Walk.

Book a Tour See Our Tours

KEEP
AUSTIN
HAUNTED

Austin's dark history is waiting. Join us for a ghost tour unlike any other — on wheels, after dark, through the city's most haunted streets.

Book Your Tour

Choose Your Tour

All tours are walking tours through downtown Austin. No prior ghost-hunting experience required — just a sense of adventure.

Classic Ghost Walk

The essential Haunted ATX experience. Visit Austin's most famously haunted locations and hear the stories behind them.

Learn more →

Historic Murder Tour

Trace the footsteps of Austin's most chilling true crime history, from the 1880s to the present day.

Learn more →

Private Group Tour

Book a private ghost tour for your group — perfect for bachelorette parties, corporate events, or a night out with friends.

Inquire →

Get in Touch

Have a question about our tours? We'd love to hear from you.
